home.title: Conceal
home.tagline:
A service that helps you stop seeing emails.
Break free from your inbox.
home.headline: How many unread emails are in your inbox right now?
home.benefit_1: Save an average of 47 minutes a day on email
home.benefit_2: Get instant alerts for urgent emails, the rest handled automatically
home.benefit_3: Start Monday morning with one weekend email summary
home.privacy_body:
Every user gets a dedicated AI agent.
This agent processes only your emails,
and no one can access your email content
or extract data under any circumstances.
home.privacy_check_1: Email content is never shared externally
home.privacy_check_2: Agent only learns your automation rules

step0.title: Welcome!
step0.subtitle: Would you like to use your Google sign-in email as your managed account?

step2.title: Automation Setup
step2.subtitle: Review your analysis and start automation

step3.title: Smartphone Email Setup
step3.subtitle: Optional — you don't have to do this now

complete.title: Onboarding complete!
complete.subtitle:
Conceal will now manage your inbox for you.
Break free from email noise.
complete.feature_1: Subscription mail and newsletters will be filtered automatically
complete.feature_2: Only important emails will be summarized and delivered
complete.feature_3: Check everything at a glance with daily digests

dashboard.title: Conceal
dashboard.no_masks: No masking addresses yet. Click "+ New address" to create one.
dashboard.smartphone_subtitle: Use Conceal on your iOS / Android device
ios_steps: Enter your masking address and app password
android_steps: Open the Gmail app or Settings app
